title: Theme Studies
description: Three independent studies for the Precision Mechanical Exploded View theme.
creative_direction: A first-pass single-image package for Precision Mechanical Exploded View: one core demonstration, one applied system, and one gallery-oriented variation, all focused on reference synthesis and visual consistency, material physics, optical behavior, and tactile surface detail, technical diagram clarity and callout structure, commercial presentation polish and practical product framing.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
